events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: grout without vent holes, voids detected by sounding test. API RP 686 covers machinery installation, grouting of baseplates. Grout should be properly placed with vent holes to avoid voids. Voids in grout under baseplate are non-compliant. Sounding test reveals hollow spots indicating voids. This is a fail.
